view.title: Validate persona scenario #3
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic simulation of the persona scenario regarding 'Digest mode (daily summary vs realtime)', but the evidence does not provide any results or outcomes from such a simulation. The expected result is to confirm the scenario behavior as supported or to produce a clear, actionable failure report, which cannot be assessed due to the lack of simulation results. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
